author: T Hayes
text:
I hired this roofing contractor back in November 2024 and paid over $600 for repairs. The work included replacing three pipe boots, sealing damaged areas, & fixing three shingles. Unfortunately, my roof is still leaking.

I’ve tried hiring other roofers to fix it, but they all told me to contact the original contractor since he mentioned I have a 5-year warranty. I’ve been reaching out since the summer, and all I’ve gotten is the runaround. It’s now almost a year later, & they still hasn’t come back to fix the problem.

The leak has gotten worse & is now damaging my bathroom. I’ve been more than patient, but this is very frustrating & disappointing. My insurance won’t cover it because the cost doesn’t meet their threshold.

I really hope he sees this review & finally comes out to honor the warranty & fix my roof before I have to take further action.

author: Kenneth Scott
text:
Exceptional Gutter Cleaning and Installation Service by JR!

I recently had the pleasure of hiring JR for gutter cleaning and gutter guard installation, and I must say that the service provided was nothing short of excellent. From start to finish, JR displayed a high level of professionalism, expertise, and attentiveness, making the entire experience smooth and hassle-free.

First and foremost, JR's knowledge in gutter maintenance was apparent from the moment he arrived. He inspected my gutters thoroughly, identifying issues that even the previous roofer had missed. His keen eye allowed him to identify a leak that could have escalated into a larger problem if left untreated. I was impressed with his attention to detail and the valuable insights he provided throughout the process.

The quality of work performed by JR exceeded my expectations. He meticulously cleaned every inch of the gutters, removing debris and buildup with precision. Additionally, his installation of gutter guards was flawless, ensuring the long-term protection and durability of my gutters. It was evident that he took great pride in his workmanship and aimed for perfection.

Furthermore, one aspect that really set JR apart was his commitment to cleanliness. He made sure to tidy up after completing the job, leaving no trace of debris or mess behind. This attention to detail demonstrated his professionalism and respect for the premises.

Overall, I was thoroughly impressed with JR's excellent service, exceptional knowledge, and his ability to identify and rectify issues others missed. I am genuinely grateful for the peace of mind his work has brought me. I look forward to utilizing his expertise again in the future and cannot recommend him highly enough to anyone in need of gutter cleaning or installation services.

Thank you, JR, for an outstanding job well done!

author: Frank Ortega
text:
Today when I woke up12/23/2022, I realized that my back gutter was hanging and honestly, I was a little but panicked.  I contacted two others who would be able to come out but on 12/27/2022 which was reasonable considering the holidays.  Problem was this could potentially get worse than it was at the time if I did not address it sooner.  I called JR and he responded quickly. He came earlier than anticipated. He gave me a quote that considering the circumstances could have been higher, but I felt it was fair. He completed the work in 29 degree weather.

Let's be clear, I did read the reviews and was apprehensive.  However, that was NOT my experience with JR.  While I do read reviews, it is important to remember what needs to be done.  I had a need. He fixed it and I am satisfied.  I have attached the before and after photos of the project.  When your house is not in order, you have a tendency to not feel okay.  I feel like a significant weight was lifted from my shoulders and I can rest well.
My advice to anyone reading this review.  Make your own judgment based on the work that needs to be done.  Not everything needs to be complicated. Furthermore, give the man a chance.  This is his business and he made it a point to come to my rescue so I am extremely grateful and satisfied with the work.

author: Muneerah Sabir
text:
Jordan is NOT professional at all.  He never came back to complete the job I paid him for even though he said it was a small piece he had to add. HE NEVER RETURNED.  Upon inquiring about completing the job he became argumentative and disrespectful and never came back.
He did not clean up after removing old gutters from my home. He asked for additional money to have the old gutters removed. He left old gutter clips ALL around the home. VERY UNPROFESSIONAL. DO NOT USE THIS GUY.

author: Jonathan B
text: Jordan did a fantastic job, we both had a small roof repair and needed the gutters cleared/leaves cleared from the roof. He got it all done in one day, and was very nice, even spotting another small issue and patching it up for us! We will use JR  again next year, and would recommend them whether you need roof repair or gutters cleared!
